'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=0NYvBb5_ASvbFUKk1ExsYM6ct0bP5INRwjoaREiNTss-1772920105-1.0.1.1-lc18oMmoklXGpkfzeFLS02dO9_GAHpYG_o2Oz00LZ1w"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
